title: pleurothyrium racemosum
intro: Pleurothyrium racemosum, also known as "cana-branca," is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. It has been traditionally used in the Amazon region for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the active compounds with a solvent, both of which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
